title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 09 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends, an decrease of 5.90% throughout the day; the main contract closed 781. the quotationin the morning was decreased by 30 yuan/mt over yesterday. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
